def test_filter_expensive_items_with_string_price():
    items = [{'name': 'A', 'price': 100}, {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'}, {'name': 'C', 'price': 50}]
    threshold = 150
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
